title: cyperus onerosus
intro: Cyperus onerosus is a species of sedge, a type of grass-like plant, commonly found in tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Cyperus onerosus are attributed to its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Cyperus onerosus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
